jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Toppr
jsonLd.description:
Toppr, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Toppr:
Toppr is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Toppr!
